summary: Iteration 36: Annual Pricing E2E Revalidation Complete. All yearly billing flows tested and working: pricing page yearly toggle, yearly checkout creation, checkout-status yearly interval, billing settings yearly display with savings badges, authenticated yearly plan change. No regressions found.
passed_tests: Public /pricing page loads with Turkish content
Pricing page yearly toggle updates Starter price to ₺9.900/yıl
Pricing page yearly toggle updates Pro price to ₺24.900/yıl
Pricing page yearly toggle shows '2 ay ücretsiz' savings badge for Starter
Pricing page yearly toggle shows '2 ay ücretsiz' savings badge for Pro
Unauthenticated yearly CTA click redirects to /signup with selectedPlan=starter
Signup page displays 'Starter' as target plan after redirect
POST /api/billing/create-checkout interval=yearly returns correct Starter amount (9900)
POST /api/billing/create-checkout interval=yearly returns correct Pro amount (24900)
POST /api/billing/create-checkout generates valid Stripe checkout URL (cs_test_...)
POST /api/billing/create-checkout rejects invalid interval values (422)
GET /api/billing/checkout-status/{session_id} returns interval=yearly for yearly sessions
GET /api/billing/checkout-status/{session_id} returns plan=starter for Starter sessions
GET /api/billing/subscription returns interval and interval_label fields
GET /api/billing/subscription returns interval_label='Aylık' for monthly subscriptions
POST /api/billing/change-plan with interval=yearly returns checkout_redirect action
POST /api/billing/change-plan yearly returns correct amount and Stripe URL
Billing settings page /app/settings/billing loads correctly
Billing settings yearly toggle updates plan cards to yearly prices
Billing settings yearly view shows '2 ay ücretsiz' badge on Starter
Billing settings yearly view shows '2 ay ücretsiz' badge on Pro
Billing settings yearly tab selection is consistent after toggle
GET /api/billing/history returns items with correct structure
Unauthenticated requests to billing APIs return 401
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: PricingPage.jsx correctly handles yearly pricing with PLAN_DISPLAY constant having yearly.amount (9900/24900) and yearly.badge ('2 ay ücretsiz')
SUCCESS: billingCatalog.js mirrors pricing data with yearly amounts and getIntervalText() returns 'Yıllık' for yearly
SUCCESS: stripe_checkout_service.py PLAN_CHECKOUT_MATRIX has yearly amounts configured correctly
SUCCESS: BillingSuccessPage.jsx shows interval='yearly' as 'Yıllık' in activation summary
SUCCESS: SettingsBillingPage.jsx billing cycle tabs (monthly/yearly) work correctly with BillingPlanCard yearly prices
SUCCESS: billing_checkout.py validates interval pattern '^(monthly|yearly)$' in CreateCheckoutBody
SUCCESS: billing_lifecycle.py ChangePlanBody validates interval pattern correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (7 passed, 1 skipped due to test dependency ordering)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing agent@acenta.test account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Annual pricing fully validated. Yearly checkout creates Stripe sessions with correct amounts (Starter=9900, Pro=24900 TRY). Checkout-status correctly returns interval=yearly. Billing settings page yearly toggle works. Account agent@acenta.test has Starter monthly subscription. Rate limiting on login is 300s cooldown per email.
